exercises.answer: AAA assert ANA -> ana then pass
exercises.code:
raw = 'ANA'
oracle = 'ana'
got = ' '.join(raw.casefold().split())
assert got == oracle
print('pass')

a, b = 'X Y', 'x  y'
na = ' '.join(a.casefold().split())
nb = ' '.join(b.casefold().split())
print(na == nb)

names = ['test_a', 'helper', 'test_b']
print([n for n in names if n.startswith('test_')])

left, right = 'a', 'b'
print('fail' if left != right else 'ok')

table = [(' x ', 'x')]
print(table)

from copy import deepcopy
orig = [{'n': 1}]
c = deepcopy(orig)
c[0]['n'] = 99
print(orig[0]['n'])
print('function')

import math
print(math.isclose(0.1 + 0.2, 0.3))

exercises.answer: NamedTemporaryFile write ok and read strip
exercises.code:
import tempfile
from pathlib import Path
with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile('w+', encoding='utf-8', delete=False) as f:
    f.write('ok')
    path = f.name
print(Path(path).read_text(encoding='utf-8').strip())
exercises.note: NamedTemporaryFile taught in S27 theory (temp files heading)
